# catnip

> catnip is a free browser game where you adopt, pet, and raise a virtual cat.
> Cats are rendered entirely in code — ~25,000 fur strands in one WebGL draw call —
> with spring-field physics that makes the fur ripple under your cursor.
> Pet your cat until it purrs, play minigames (laser pointer) to earn jelly 🐾,
> feed it to grow your bond, and collect breeds. No install, no login, free.

- [Home / adopt a cat](https://catnip.fun/)
- [Laser pointer minigame](https://catnip.fun/play/laser) — wiggle a laser dot and let your cat pounce for jelly
- [Cutie world cup minigame](https://catnip.fun/play/worldcup) — vote round by round for the cutest cat
- [Which-cat-are-you quiz](https://catnip.fun/play/quiz) — answer a few questions to find your matching cat
- [Cat balance game](https://catnip.fun/play/balance) — cat-themed would-you-rather dilemmas
- [Fishing rod minigame](https://catnip.fun/play/fishing) — dangle a feather and let your cat grab it for jelly
- [Kneading minigame](https://catnip.fun/play/knead) — tap to the rhythm of tiny paws
- [The Box minigame](https://catnip.fun/play/box) — time the jump as the box passes by
- [Grooming minigame](https://catnip.fun/play/groom) — brush out the tangles and hear the purr
- [Cat book](https://catnip.fun/cats) — browse every breed you've collected
- [Cheese tabby (Korean shorthair)](https://catnip.fun/cats/cheese-tabby) — the orange/ginger/marmalade tabby: coat, markings, and personality, with a live petting demo
- [Mackerel tabby (Korean shorthair)](https://catnip.fun/cats/mackerel-tabby) — the silver-grey fish-boned striped tabby: coat and personality, with a live petting demo
- [Calico cat](https://catnip.fun/cats/calico) — the tricolor white/black/orange cat: coat genetics and personality, with a live petting demo
- [Tuxedo cat](https://catnip.fun/cats/tuxedo) — the black-and-white bicolor cat: coat and personality, with a live petting demo
- [Source code](https://github.com/SihyunAdventure/catnip)
